applicability_boundary.admitted_family: Gaussian-OU toy world generated by the canonical runner
applicability_boundary.metric_scope: finite `linear_identifiability_r2` values returned by canonical quality envelopes
applicability_boundary.non_claim: does not claim independent re-draws for each prefix K
applicability_boundary.seed_sequence: deterministic child seeds from one master seed; prefixes reuse the same order

pattern_spec.name: latent-linear-recovery
pattern_spec.target: recover z from representation h by linear least squares
